gold.rationale: 样本把“买不到黄金”的主要原因归结为所谓“监管要求暂停/控制实物交割”的全国性措施，并用门店告示牌与APP弹窗截图作证，但这些关键“监管口径/暂停时间/限购规则”缺乏可核实来源且被具体化为疑似内部通知；同时配图中存在生成截图与后期加贴告示牌等操控，导致图像证据与文本结论共同构成虚构与误导，整体核心叙事不成立。

atoms: A photo of a gold jewelry store interior with customers queuing at the counter.
A white sign taped to the glass window with black Chinese text.
The sign reads '今日金条售罄' (Gold bars sold out today).
The sign reads '足金饰品需预约' (Solid gold jewelry requires appointment).
The sign includes a smaller note: '为您带来的不便，敬请谅解' (Apologies for the inconvenience).
Long gold chains hang vertically in the foreground on the left.
A female employee is visible behind the glass counter.
A watermark at the bottom reads '@封面新闻' (Cover News).
Several people are standing in line, including a woman in a dark blue shirt and a man in a white t-shirt.
Three screenshots of a mobile app interface showing a 'Precious Metals/Gold' page.
The app header shows '贵金属/黄金' (Precious Metals/Gold).
A product card displays '投资金条-100g' (Investment Gold Bar - 100g).
The price is listed as '¥52,800.00' with a per-gram price of '¥528.00/克'.
A white pop-up modal window is overlaid on the center of the screen.
The modal has a red warning triangle icon at the top.
The modal text reads '根据监管要求，现暂停实物金条申购与提货服务' (According to regulatory requirements, purchase and pickup services for physical gold bars are temporarily suspended).
The modal text continues: '已提交订单将顺延处理' (Submitted orders will be processed later).
A blue button at the bottom of the modal says '我知道了' (I understand).
The background of the app is dimmed behind the modal.
A screenshot of a social media post (Weibo) with a large text note on the left.
The text note has a blue background and large black text.
The text reads: '刚刚黄金回调了一百多' (Gold just dropped by over 100).
The text continues: '我今天上车就一克亏了一百多？！' (I lost over 100 per gram just by buying today?!).
To the right is a user profile section with a blurred avatar and name.
The post title is '黄金跳水了' (Gold has plummeted).
The post content repeats the sentiment about the price drop.
A watermark at the bottom reads '@新闻晨报' (News Morning Post).
A red '关注' (Follow) button is visible in the top right corner.
A screenshot of a financial trading app showing a chart for '伦敦银 (现货白银) CFD' (London Silver CFD).
The current price is displayed in large green numbers: '99.67'.
The price change is '-15.72' and '-13.62%'.
The timestamp on the chart is '01-30 18:42:00'.
Below the chart, there is a physical metal plaque resting on a glass display case.
The plaque lists fees in Chinese: '工费 15.00元/克' (Work fee 15.00 yuan/gram).
The plaque lists '换购补差 30.00元/克' (Exchange difference 30.00 yuan/gram).
The plaque lists '退货手续费 5%' (Return handling fee 5%).
The plaque text at the bottom reads: '投资金条：需预约，现货以到店为准' (Investment gold bars: Appointment required, spot goods subject to store availability).
A watermark at the bottom reads '@新闻晨报' (News Morning Post).
A screenshot of a dark-themed financial analysis post.
The text is in Chinese and discusses technical analysis of gold prices.
The text mentions '行情反弹至5028一线之前多次承压' (Market rebounded to 5028 line, previously under pressure).
The text suggests a short sell target: '目标看4995#黄金#' (Target looking at 4995 #Gold#).
A small stock chart is visible in the background on the left side.
A watermark at the bottom right reads '@金油实战大神-老陈' (Gold Oil Master - Lao Chen).
The background is black with white text.
A photo of a digital price display screen inside a store.
The screen header has a logo that says '水贝会' (Shuibei Association).
The screen is divided into two columns: '今日价格' (Today's Price) and '回收价格' (Recycling Price).
The row for '黄金' (Gold) shows '791元/克' (791 yuan/gram) for Today's Price and '773元/克' for Recycling Price.
The row for '铂金' (Platinum) shows '239元/克' and '214元/克'.
The row for '白银' (Silver) shows '9.9元/克' and '5.7元/克'.
The update time at the bottom reads '2025-04-23 15:04'.
A watermark in the bottom right corner reads '红星新闻' (Red Star News).

visual_indicators.scene_description: A candid photo inside a gold jewelry store showing a busy scene with customers queuing. A prominent white sign taped to the window announces that gold bars are sold out and solid gold jewelry requires an appointment. Long gold chains hang in the foreground.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 今日金条售罄 | 足金饰品需预约 | 为您带来的不便，敬请谅解 | @封面新闻

visual_indicators.scene_description: A composite of three screenshots from a mobile app showing a gold purchase page. A modal popup explicitly states that physical gold bar purchase and pickup services are temporarily suspended due to regulatory requirements.

visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The text expresses the emotional reaction to the price drop ('跳水') described in the post.

visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image links the volatile market data (silver drop) with the physical store rules (appointment required) mentioned in the text.

retrieved_evidence.text: 商业银行渠道在本轮国际金价大跌期间也受到广泛关注，不少投资者习惯通过银行APP购买贵金属理财或申购实物金条。据当事人提供的页面文案描述，部分银行在贵金属下单环节弹出提示，称“应监管要求，暂停实物金条申购或提货，恢复时间另行通知”。有业内人士指出，这类限制通常涉及流动性管理和风险控制，与国内对黄金交易和实物交割的审慎监管框架有关。

【金价跳水，一天暴跌超400美元，“说话间就跌了几十元”，网友：我才刚上车！】1月30日，国际金价大跳水，现货黄金从最高5450美元/盎司一路下跌，一度跌破5000美元，最大跌幅达8%。与此同时，国际银价也急转直下，现货白银跌破100美元大关，一度跌超17%。#多品牌设置金条金饰退货手续费#

同日，A股黄 ​​​

信老陈，得暴富！摸顶空再次疯狂收割！[给力]

行情从5029一线再次回撤，5030压制再次发力，目前行情已跌至5012附近，上方5026空单呈现出140点利润！空头思路堪称无敌，日内连空连捷，连胜的号角已吹响！日内行情依旧是震荡运行，高空低多没问题，利润收割轻松如喝水！[不愧是你]#黄金##金价# ​​​
国际金价近日出现明显回调，引发国内投资者和消费者对实物黄金的关注。在多个一线城市核心商圈，金店柜台前排队等候咨询和购买的人数有所增加，据相关人员介绍，一些品牌在显眼位置张贴“部分金条售罄”“暂停售卖某些规格”等提示，强调需要提前预约或等候到货。这种在金价大跌背景下出现的短期热购氛围，与投资者希望“逢低买入”锁定成本的心理密切相关。
【#金价大跌消费者冲进金店# 店员：近期生意最好的一天】#消费者放弃观望趁金价大跌抓紧入手#12月30日，国内多家黄金珠宝品牌的足金首饰价格迎来回调，有金店的足金售价一夜之间大跌53元/克。某一线城市多家老庙黄金门店的店员均称，今天是近期生意最火爆的一天。“上午已经有客人到店没有空闲的店员接 ​​​

随着金饰销售升温，部分地区出现“个别门店紧俏、部分产品需等待”的情况。然而多名业内人士近日在接受采访时强调，并非所有门店都出现了明显缺货，一些品牌仍可通过预订方式满足消费者需求。也有门店表示，个别热门规格或款式若要“现货提走”，可能需要适度加价，或排队等候到货通知。零售业分析人士认为，这种“局部紧俏、整体可订”的状态在一定程度上缓和了供需压力，但也使消费者在付款方式、等待周期和价格预期方面需要更多权衡。
实体黄金产品的供给链条包括上游矿产开采、精炼加工、中间批发和终端零售多个环节，任何环节的资金占用和物流周转都会影响终端门店的现货充裕程度。分析师指出，在国际金价跳涨跳跌的阶段，批发商和零售商会出于价格锁定和库存风险考量，暂缓大量备货或调整到货节奏，从而出现部分规格需要预订的情形。配合国内监管对银行和贵金属机构的风险提示要求，便形成了金价下跌、需求集中、而部分渠道短期收紧实物销售的复杂局面。
据零售行业观察人士近日在走访中介绍，随着国际金价在前期高位后出现一定幅度回调，部分城市的金店客流出现明显回升。在成都多家大型商圈，记者看到，临近午后时段仍有不少消费者在柜台前选购金条与金饰，有门店称“下午人明显比前几天多”。多位店员表示，近期咨询与成交数量均有所增加，部分热门款式短时内补货频繁，整体生意较前期价格高位阶段“更为火热”，但具体销售数据尚未对外公布。

在金价阶段性回调的背景下，围绕“多品牌设置金条金饰退货手续费”的话题近日在消费者群体中引发关注。据多家门店销售人员介绍，目前部分品牌对金条、金饰的退货或回购设置了不同标准，包括按克数收取一定比例的手续费、扣除工费以及按当日回购价与挂牌价之间的差价结算等。部分消费者反映，在排队抢购热门产品后，如遇短期内价格再度波动，若考虑退货或变现，往往需要重新计算上述费用，实际成本“比想象中要高”，相关细节以各门店公示政策为准。
国内监管部门长期对贵金属交易保持审慎态度，强调防范过度投机和销售中的风险提示不到位。近年来，多份涉及黄金及其他贵金属的监管文件要求金融机构充分揭示风险，控制高杠杆或复杂结构产品的发行规模。据银行人士介绍，当国际金价大幅波动、投资者情绪异常活跃时，机构可能根据内部风控和监管沟通，对部分实物黄金产品实施临时数量限制或暂停提货安排，以防范集中挤兑和操作风险扩大。
实体金店在国际金价剧烈波动阶段往往会调整工费、退货和回购条款，以应对价格风险。近期有消费者反映，部分品牌在柜台显著位置标示“退货需收取手续费”“工费上调”“回购价差扩大”等规则说明，并在角落标注“金条需预约、到货通知”等提示。按照多家门店的说法，此类做法旨在覆盖加工、运营和价格波动成本，也使得消费者在金价下跌时期面对的不仅是抢购情绪，还包括对回购折扣和退货条件的细致比较。
黄金在中国家庭资产配置和消费文化中兼具投资、保值与礼赠功能。逢节假日或婚庆旺季，金饰、金条和纪念章等产品需求通常会阶段性上升，而当国际金价出现明显下跌时，部分家庭会视其为长期价值储藏的入场机会。据业内观察，当前“金价大跌”的舆论环境叠加居民储蓄偏好，使得不少消费者涌向传统金店和银行网点咨询，进一步放大了对热门规格、投资金条库存的短期需求冲击。
据接近贵金属交易圈的市场人士透露，本周某个交易日国内黄金盘中出现一次较为快速的短线波动。一名自称长期参与现货及衍生品操作的交易员在个人盘中记录中写道，当日价格一度在接近 5030 一线附近徘徊，随后短时间内回撤至约 5012 一带，波动节奏偏快。据了解，这一记录更多反映个人交易终端的盘面观察，并不构成权威行情报价，但在社交平台上引发部分投资者对短线风险与交易节奏的讨论。
据多家市场资讯机构近日监测，国际黄金价格在本周某个交易日盘中出现较为剧烈的下挫走势，盘面呈现出快速“跳水”、短时间内明显回撤的特征。多名接受采访的业内人士表示，当日金价在较短时间内多次拉升与回落，波动区间较此前几个交易日更为宽幅，部分投资者情绪趋于谨慎。消息人士称，这一变化与近期外盘宏观消息交织影响有关，具体触发因素仍有待进一步观察，相关机构提醒投资者关注后续走势与风险提示。
国际黄金市场在近期出现盘中大幅波动，伦敦金和纽约期金合约价格一度快速跳水，技术层面的支撑位被短时间击穿。据财经媒体和机构研报梳理，此轮回撤与美国利率预期变化、避险情绪回落以及部分多头集中平仓有关。行情走势图上呈现出短时间内急跌后震荡整理的特征，引发国内投资者对黄金资产配置时点与风险敞口的再评估，也成为国内讨论“金价大跌但买不进黄金”现象的背景之一。
从全球视角看，国际金价受地缘政治不确定性、主要经济体货币政策和美元走势等多重因素影响。世界黄金协会等机构的统计显示，除了投资需求外，各国央行的官方储备买入以及首饰消费亦对价格形成支撑。近期在金价回撤过程中，一些亚洲市场的零售投资需求出现阶段性释放，国内关于“买不进黄金”的讨论也折射出在宏观环境不确定、居民寻求资产保值手段时，对黄金这一传统避险资产的高度关注。
在国际金价大幅回调的背景下，短线交易者和量化爱好者活跃于各类社交平台，记录自己的黄金及贵金属交易操作。据近日流传的行情记录和复盘文字，部分投资者分享了在关键阻力位和支撑位附近短线进出场的策略，讨论止损点设定、杠杆比例以及与美元指数、实际利率之间的联动关系。这类记录更多集中于纸黄金、期货和场外衍生品交易的短线博弈，而非银行和金店渠道的实物交割问题，但也折射出市场对金价跳水的高敏感度。
围绕国际金价大跌与国内“买不进黄金”的议题，有观点提到实物黄金与纸黄金、黄金ETF等不同投资工具的差异。据券商研究部门介绍，实物金条通常通过银行、品牌金店或专业金交所指定机构销售，涉及库存、运输和保险等成本，而账户类黄金则以记账方式反映头寸，不涉及即时提货。近期部分渠道对实物交割进行限购或暂停时，投资者更倾向于通过可交易的金融产品参与金价波动，这在一定程度上缓冲了对实体门店库存的压力。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the general event of a price drop and increased store traffic but contains a specific fabricated quote and a misattributed image regarding the price drop.
text_analysis.t1_evidence: The post claims a specific quote from a 'long-term precious metal channel business person' stating 'the easiest risk to emerge is not just price risk, but poor liquidity experience', whereas the evidence (src_083_1, src_083_2, src_083_3, src_083_4, src_083_5, src_083_6, src_083_7, src_083_8) contains no such quote or attribution.
t1_problematic_subclaims: Quote from a 'long-term precious metal channel business person' about liquidity experience
text_analysis.t3_evidence: The post presents Image 6 (dated 2025-04-23, showing Shuibei prices) as visual evidence of the 'price drop' event described in the text, but the evidence confirms the price drop occurred in January (src_083_1) or early March (src_083_2, src_083_3), making the image temporally mismatched and from a different event/location.
t3_problematic_subclaims: Image 6 presented as evidence of the price drop event
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate regarding the event flow but relies on a fabricated quote and a temporally incorrect image to support its claims.

images.scene_description: A view through a jewelry store window showing a queue of customers inside, with a sign taped to the glass stating 'Today's gold bars are sold out' and 'Precious gold ornaments require appointment'.

images.explanation: The image is a genuine social media post reflecting the text's claim about investor losses during the price drop.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖子的核心叙事建立在大量编造的细节之上，例如捏造了不存在的50克单日限额，且将发生于1月份的金价暴跌错误地置于3月中旬，图文时间与语境亦严重不符，尽管描述了一定的市场拥挤感，但其主要结论基于虚假前提。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post is mostly accurate regarding the event itself but fails to correctly frame the visual evidence, using an image from a different time period to support the narrative.
judge.core_claim: Gold prices dropped sharply ('plummeted'), causing a surge in consumer demand for physical gold, yet stores and banks are restricting sales, suspending pickup services, or failing to process online orders due to regulatory requirements and inventory constraints.
key_subclaims: International gold prices experienced a sudden 'plummet' or sharp drop recently.
Consumers are queuing up in physical stores to buy gold due to the price drop.
Some stores have sold out of gold bars or require appointments for purchase.
Online platforms are suspending orders or showing 'order failure' due to regulatory requirements.
Banks are restricting pickup services or requiring appointments for physical gold bars.
The price drop is attributed to international market volatility.
Image 6 (dated 2025-04-23) serves as visual evidence of the price drop.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: International gold prices experienced a sudden 'plummet' or sharp drop recently.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms a sharp drop in international gold prices (Jan 30) and volatility.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Consumers are queuing up in physical stores to buy gold due to the price drop.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms increased foot traffic and queuing in stores during price drops.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Some stores have sold out of gold bars or require appointments for purchase.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms some stores are sold out or require appointments.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Online platforms are suspending orders or showing 'order failure' due to regulatory requirements.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms banks/platforms suspending services due to regulatory requirements.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Banks are restricting pickup services or requiring appointments for physical gold bars.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms banks restricting pickup and requiring appointments.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The price drop is attributed to international market volatility.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence attributes the drop to international market volatility and macro factors.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 6 (dated 2025-04-23) serves as visual evidence of the price drop.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence indicates the price drop event occurred in January, while Image 6 is dated April 23, 2025, creating a temporal mismatch.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post accurately describes the general phenomenon of gold price drops and subsequent sales restrictions, but it misuses Image 6 as visual evidence for the price drop event. Image 6 is dated April 2025, while the text claims the event happened in January, creating a significant temporal mismatch (T3) and contextual inconsistency (C2).

image_findings.explanation: The image shows a store with a sign stating gold bars are sold out and appointments are needed, which aligns with the text's description of store restrictions.
The screenshot shows a regulatory popup suspending physical gold bar services, directly supporting the text's claim about online/bank restrictions.
The screenshot shows a user complaining about gold price drops, which aligns with the text's narrative of consumer sentiment.
The image combines a silver CFD chart showing a drop with a store sign about fees and appointments, supporting the text's discussion of market volatility and store rules.
The screenshot shows a technical analysis post about gold price movements, supporting the text's mention of market volatility.
The image displays a price board dated 2025-04-23, which contradicts the text's claim that the price drop event occurred in January, creating a temporal mismatch.
